RecipeDef.label: make charcoal
RecipeDef.description: Char wood into charcoal at a campfire.

RecipeDef.label: smelt small molten iron bloom
RecipeDef.description: Smelt a small batch of steel into molten iron at a blast furnace.
RecipeDef.jobString: Smelting a small molten iron bloom.

RecipeDef.label: smelt medium molten iron bloom
RecipeDef.description: Smelt a medium batch of steel into molten iron at a blast furnace.
RecipeDef.jobString: Smelting a medium molten iron bloom.

RecipeDef.label: smelt large molten iron bloom
RecipeDef.description: Smelt a large batch of steel into molten iron at a blast furnace.
RecipeDef.jobString: Smelting a large molten iron bloom.

RecipeDef.label: refine carbon steel from small molten iron bloom
RecipeDef.description: Refine a small molten iron bloom with iron ore in a converter to produce carbon steel.

RecipeDef.label: refine carbon steel from medium molten iron bloom
RecipeDef.description: Refine a medium molten iron bloom with iron ore in a converter to produce carbon steel.

RecipeDef.label: refine carbon steel from large molten iron bloom
RecipeDef.description: Refine a large molten iron bloom with iron ore in a converter to produce carbon steel.

RecipeDef.label: refine crude oil into diesel
RecipeDef.description: Refine low quality crude oil into diesel fuel.

RecipeDef.label: refine crude oil into kerosene
RecipeDef.description: Refine low quality crude oil into kerosene fuel.

RecipeDef.label: refine crude oil into naphtha
RecipeDef.description: Distill a small amount of volatile naphtha from low quality crude oil.

RecipeDef.label: make plain dog chew
RecipeDef.description: Make a plain BTX-infused dog chew from naphtha and leather.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph crude oil contract
RecipeDef.description: Transmit a sale order for low quality crude oil and receive Sthaler banknotes.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph diesel contract
RecipeDef.description: Transmit a sale order for diesel and receive Sthaler banknotes.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph kerosene contract
RecipeDef.description: Transmit a sale order for kerosene and receive Sthaler banknotes.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph government bond purchase
RecipeDef.description: Transmit a purchase order for a Vesenica government bond using Sthaler banknotes.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph government bond purchase x5
RecipeDef.description: Transmit a bulk purchase order for five Vesenica government bonds using Sthaler banknotes.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph Continental Petroleum bond purchase
RecipeDef.description: Transmit a purchase order for a Continental Petroleum corporate bond using Sthaler banknotes.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph Continental Petroleum bond purchase x5
RecipeDef.description: Transmit a bulk purchase order for five Continental Petroleum corporate bonds using Sthaler banknotes.
RecipeDef.jobString: Transmitting bulk Continental Petroleum bond purchase.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph gold exchange to Sthaler
RecipeDef.description: Transmit an exchange order to convert gold into Sthaler banknotes.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph gold exchange to Sthaler x10
RecipeDef.description: Transmit a bulk exchange order to convert gold into Sthaler banknotes.
RecipeDef.jobString: Transmitting bulk gold to Sthaler exchange.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph Sthaler exchange to gold
RecipeDef.description: Transmit an exchange order to convert Sthaler banknotes into gold.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph Sthaler exchange to gold x10
RecipeDef.description: Transmit a bulk exchange order to convert Sthaler banknotes into gold.
RecipeDef.jobString: Transmitting bulk Sthaler to gold exchange.

RecipeDef.label: press low quality torsion spring
RecipeDef.description: Form a crude torsion spring from steel with the hydraulic press.

RecipeDef.label: make shaft
RecipeDef.description: Turn carbon steel into a straight mechanical shaft on a lathe.

RecipeDef.label: roll uniform steel plate
RecipeDef.description: Roll carbon steel into an even, uniform steel plate.

RecipeDef.label: press V-spring
RecipeDef.description: Form a shaped V-spring from steel with the hydraulic press.

RecipeDef.label: press low quality magazine spring
RecipeDef.description: Form a rough magazine spring from steel with the hydraulic press.

RecipeDef.label: make low quality gun barrel
RecipeDef.description: Bore and turn a low-quality metal gun barrel from steel on a lathe.

RecipeDef.label: make shotgun barrel
RecipeDef.description: Bore and turn a heavy metal shotgun barrel from steel on a workbench.

RecipeDef.label: make low quality torsion spring by hand
RecipeDef.description: Slowly form a crude torsion spring from steel at a basic workbench.

RecipeDef.label: make V-spring by hand
RecipeDef.description: Slowly form a shaped V-spring from steel at a basic workbench.

RecipeDef.label: make low quality magazine spring by hand
RecipeDef.description: Slowly form a rough magazine spring from steel at a basic workbench.

RecipeDef.label: make low quality gun barrel by hand
RecipeDef.description: Slowly bore and finish a low-quality metal gun barrel from steel at a basic workbench.
RecipeDef.jobString: Making low quality gun barrel by hand.

RecipeDef.label: make shotgun barrel by hand
RecipeDef.description: Slowly bore and finish a heavy shotgun barrel from steel at a basic workbench.

RecipeDef.label: make wild west gun barrel by hand
RecipeDef.description: Slowly bore and rifle a precision wild west gun barrel from steel and an industrial component at a basic workbench.
RecipeDef.jobString: Making wild west gun barrel by hand.

RecipeDef.label: craft Springfield M1861
RecipeDef.description: Craft a Springfield M1861 rifled musket on a workbench using a low-quality gun barrel, V-spring, steel, and wood.

RecipeDef.label: craft Colt Army Model 1860
RecipeDef.description: Craft a Colt Army Model 1860 using simple machined parts, a V-spring, steel, and wood.

RecipeDef.label: craft Colt SAA
RecipeDef.description: Craft a Colt Single Action Army revolver using machined steel parts, a V-spring, and an industrial component.

RecipeDef.label: craft S&W Model 3
RecipeDef.description: Craft a Smith & Wesson Model 3 revolver using machined steel parts, a V-spring, and industrial components.

RecipeDef.label: craft M1911 pistol
RecipeDef.description: Craft an M1911 semi-automatic pistol using steel, a magazine spring, and industrial components.

RecipeDef.label: make primary cell
RecipeDef.description: Assemble a primary cell (chemical battery) using steel and an industrial component.

RecipeDef.label: make wild west gun barrel
RecipeDef.description: Bore and rifling a precision wild west metal gun barrel from steel and an industrial component.

RecipeDef.label: craft Springfield M1873
RecipeDef.description: Craft a Springfield M1873 breech-loading rifle using a low-quality gun barrel, low-quality torsion spring, steel, and an industrial component.

RecipeDef.label: craft Henry rifle
RecipeDef.description: Craft a Henry lever-action rifle using a wild west barrel, magazine spring, steel, wood, and industrial components.

RecipeDef.label: craft Winchester M1887
RecipeDef.description: Craft a Winchester M1887 lever-action shotgun using a shotgun barrel, magazine spring, steel, wood, and industrial components.

RecipeDef.label: craft Winchester M1895
RecipeDef.description: Craft a Winchester M1895 lever-action rifle using a wild west barrel, magazine spring, steel, wood, and industrial components.

RecipeDef.label: convert Springfield M1861 into M1873
RecipeDef.description: Convert a Springfield M1861 into a Springfield M1873 breech-loading rifle, replacing its V-spring mechanism with a low-quality torsion spring.

RecipeDef.label: craft Krag-Jorgensen
RecipeDef.description: Craft a Krag-Jorgensen bolt-action rifle using a wild west barrel, magazine spring, steel, wood, and industrial components.

RecipeDef.label: craft Springfield M1903
RecipeDef.description: Craft a Springfield M1903 bolt-action rifle using a wild west barrel, magazine spring, steel, wood, and industrial components.

RecipeDef.label: craft Springfield M1903 Pedersen device
RecipeDef.description: Craft a Springfield M1903 fitted with a Pedersen device using precision machined parts and industrial components.

RecipeDef.label: craft M1 Garand
RecipeDef.description: Craft an M1 Garand semi-automatic rifle using a wild west barrel, magazine spring, steel, wood, and industrial components.

RecipeDef.label: craft M1919A6 light machine gun
RecipeDef.description: Craft a portable M1919A6 light machine gun using a wild west barrel, magazine springs, uniform rolled steel plate, steel, and industrial components.
